title: Plastic Halo (Vapor Trap genre - shot 1)
caption: Vapor Trap genre - untouched pure AI
about: Vapor trap with half-time 140 feel, cloudy sub pulse, clipped hi-hat triplets, glassy synth pads, and a sparse arpeggiated hook; verse rides low and roomy, pre-chorus lifts with filtered chords and reverse swells, chorus opens with stacked doubles and a chantable topline, Auto-tuned lead with soft octave layers, ad-lib throws on key words, tape hiss and distant chimes between phrases, Glossy, hazy, and intimate with a wet low end, simple
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Late bus, rain on the glass
Your name on my screen, too fast
I keep it cool, play it light
But I replay you all night

Pocket full of loose change
Mind stuck in a loop, same frame
You say one thing, I feel ten
Then it fades, then it comes back again

[Pre-Chorus]
Hold on, don’t go
I was almost whole
Hold on, don’t fade
I’m still in your wake

[Chorus]
Plastic halo, stay on me
Plastic halo, let me breathe
I drift when you call my name
I fall back in the same cold place
Plastic halo, don’t let go
Plastic halo, take me slow

[Verse 2]
Mall food cold, blue booth glow
Your voice in my head on low
I act like I’m tough, act like I’m fine
But your little ghost owns my mind

Late reply, that hurt slow
Like syrup sinking through snow
I want the truth, even if it stings
Better a cut than a thousand strings

[Pre-Chorus]
Hold on, don’t go
I was almost whole
Hold on, don’t fade
I’m still in your wake

[Chorus]
Plastic halo, stay on me
Plastic halo, let me breathe
I drift when you call my name
I fall back in the same cold place
Plastic halo, don’t let go
Plastic halo, take me slow

[Bridge]
If you leave, leave a trace
A little shine on my face
If you stay, stay near
Let the empty parts disappear

[Final Chorus]
Plastic halo, stay on me
Plastic halo, let me breathe
I drift when you call my name
I fall back in the same cold place
Plastic halo, don’t let go
Plastic halo, take me slow
